use_cases: Displaying user profile information with avatar and bio
Showing team member cards in a grid layout
Creating user contact cards for social platforms
Implementing user info sections in dashboards
ai_summary: A minimalist profile card component for displaying user information including avatar, name, bio, and contact details. Features a clean flat design with subtle hover interactions and supports flexible layout customization. Commonly used in team pages, user directories, social platforms, and dashboard interfaces to present user identities in a visually consistent manner.
